ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province the city belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the city in km² */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the province */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the province in km² */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the school is located in */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was established */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students */,
  "total_teachers" INTEGER /* Total number of teachers */,
  "head_teacher_name" TEXT /* Name of the head teacher */,
  "head_teacher_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the head teacher */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the school in km² */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the school */,
  "bomb_blats_occurred" INTEGER /* Number of bomb blasts occurred near the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the facility belongs to */,
  "drinking_water" INTEGER /* Availability of drinking water */,
  "toilet" INTEGER /* Availability of toilet */,
  "electricity" INTEGER /* Availability of electricity */,
  "internet" INTEGER /* Availability of internet */,
  "library" INTEGER /* Availability of library */,
  "playground" INTEGER /* Availability of playground */,
  "sports_facilities" INTEGER /* Availability of sports facilities */,
  "medical_facility" INTEGER /* Availability of medical facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the metric belongs to */,
  "boys_enrolled" REAL /* Percentage of boys enrolled */,
  "girls_enrolled" REAL /* Percentage of girls enrolled */,
  "total_enrolled" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "dropout_rate" REAL /* Dropout rate */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate */,
  "complete_primary_schools" REAL /* Percentage of complete primary schools */,
  "primary_schools_single_classroom" REAL /* Percentage of primary schools with single classroom */,
  "primary_schools_single_teacher" REAL /* Percentage of primary schools with single teacher */,
  "gender_parity_score" REAL /* Gender parity score */,
  "retention_score" REAL /* Retention score */,
  "learning_score" REAL /* Learning score */,
  "classroom_count" INTEGER /* Number of classrooms */,
  "teacher_student_ratio" REAL /* Teacher-to-student ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_metrics_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terrorist_attacks" (
  "attack_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attack */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the attack occurred near */,
  "attack_date" TEXT /* Date of the attack */,
  "affectees" INTEGER /* Number of affectees */,
  "attack_type" TEXT /* Type of attack */,
  "attack_description" TEXT /* Description of the attack */,
  "injured_count" INTEGER /* Number of injured individuals */,
  "fatalities_count" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Response time of emergency services in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attack_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terrorist_attacks_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)
